improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, unlimited workspace. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access.">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value proposition in under 160 characters. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, or messaging apps—critical for B2B audiences who share tools with colleagues. These tags reinforce the free trial offer and key features without making unverified claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace for your business operations. Try three searches free — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: This copy immediately establishes what Gideon is (Claude-powered AI assistant), who it's for (trade and business professionals), and the core benefits (instant answers, voice chat, workspace). The subheading reinforces the free trial offer with a low-friction CTA that reduces hesitation. The structure moves from brand introduction to value props to action trigger in a logical flow that supports conversion.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual plans saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common conversion friction point—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free trial to paid membership, including transparent pricing and benefits, it reduces uncertainty and builds trust. Prospective members can make an informed decision, which increases conversion likelihood.
